mapper.select: SELECT mbr_sq FROM kdmp_mbr_info WHERE mbr_st = 'W' AND exit_dt <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -3 MONTH) AND NOT mbr_nm = '---'
mapper.update:
UPDATE kdmp_mbr_info SET mbr_nm = '---', mbr_mobile_phone = '-----------', mbr_ci = mbr_id WHERE mbr_sq IN
#{deleteMemberSq}

UPDATE kdmp_mbr_detail SET mbr_email = '---', mbr_drv_licnum = '---', mbr_drv_insurnum = '---', mbr_basic_address = '---', mbr_detail_address = '---', mbr_drv_insurnm = '---', mbr_drv_insurkind = '---', mbr_wdt_account = '---', mbr_wdt_account_ownnm = '---', mbr_vir_account = '---', mbr_vir_account_ownnm = '---', vir_bank_kind = '---', wdt_bank_kind = '---', mbr_toss_billingkey = '---', mbr_insur_juminnum = '---' WHERE mbr_sq IN
#{deleteMemberSq}
